battleTraits.name: Noble Deeds
battleTraits.effect: Each time a friendly HERO uses a FIGHT ability, after its attacks have been resolved, give that HERO a number of noble deeds points equal to the number of damage points allocated by that ability. Each HERO can have a maximum of 6 noble deeds points at any time.

battleTraits.name: Feeding Frenzy
battleTraits.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly HEROES that have 6 noble deeds points.

battleTraits.name: Summon Loyal Subjects
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly HERO with any noble deeds points to use this ability.
battleTraits.effect:
Spend any number of that HERO’s noble deeds points as follows:
- Pick a friendly Cryptguard unit within 9" of this unit and spend 1 noble deeds point to return 1 model to that unit.
- Pick a friendly Morbheg Knights unit within 9" of this unit and spend 2 noble deeds points to return 1 model to that unit.

enhancements.name: Ulguan Cloak
enhancements.effect: Your general is not visible to enemy models that are more than 12" away from them.

enhancements.name: Blood-River Chalice
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase

enhancements.name: Rousing Oration
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice for each friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general. Do not roll a dice for your general. For each 5+, give 1 noble deeds point to your general.

enhancements.name: Crimson Victuals
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Then, if your Cryptguard unit is within 6" of the target, you can return 1 slain model to your Cryptguard unit for each damage point allocated by this ability.

regimentAbilities.name: Crusading Army
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly units.

regimentAbilities.name: Defenders of the Realm
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to save rolls for friendly units that are contesting an objective you control.

abilities.name: Deranged Transformation
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, until the start of your next turn, add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic and add 1 to wound rolls for its attacks.

abilities.name: Royal Bodyguard
abilities.effect: Add 1 to ward rolls for friendly HEROES that are wholly within this unit's combat range.

abilities.name: Predator’s Pounce
abilities.effect: This unit can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit when it uses RETREAT abilities.

abilities.name: Victory Feast
abilities.effect: If any models were slain by this unit this turn, Heal (D6) this unit, and this unit can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.
